description: Account of the Qodesh: building expenditures, ca. 1040. A badly damaged fragment of an account written by Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya. Work done at Dar al-Barqi is mentioned, and various payments for water, bricks, clay, lime, pillars, gypsum; also, repairs of doors and windows. Water carriers, masons, diggers, and helpers are paid for different periods of work, in the course of several weeks. The names of the months are preserved, Shevat and Adar. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 191 #21)
tags: account, qodesh, waqf, 11th c, Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya, communal
description_he: חשבון הקדש: עבודות בנייה, כ-1040. בכתב יפת בן דוד בן שכניה. עבודות בדאר אל-ברקי: מים, לבנים, חימר, סיד, עמודים וגבס; תיקוני דלתות וחלונות. חודשים שבט ואדר.
